description: kp-horary baseline — number-derived Lagna. --datetime here IS the moment-of-reading (the moment the question is asked); --number is the pinned horary number.

args.--question: Golden regression fixture — will the querent's pending matter resolve favourably?

chart_path_note: kp-horary has no --chart flag (see compute_kp_horary_baseline.py's argparse) — the chart is always number-derived (Lagna rotated from --number), so there is no pasted-chart path to exercise here. Ephemeris-only by nature; intentionally NOT given a chart_path block.
